import { NavLink } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Form, FormControl, Nav } from 'react-bootstrap'; function Menu() { return (
`menu-link ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}`} > HOME `menu-link ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}`} > PRODUCTS
); } export default Menu;
